dsl_rule.translation_notes: Dual moving average crossover with short-term MA (sma_10 approximates 10-period lookback) and long-term MA (sma_50 approximates 50-period lookback as specified). Signal is context-dependent, generating both long and short entries/exits based on crossover direction. Exit conditions are opposite crossovers as specified. Target regimes set to TRENDING as specified in signal requirements.

backtest_rule.reason: Dual moving average crossover with short-term MA (sma_10 approximates 10-period lookback) and long-term MA (sma_50 approximates 50-period lookback as specified). Signal is context-dependent, generating both long and short entries/exits based on crossover direction. Exit conditions are opposite crossovers as specified. Target regimes set to TRENDING as specified in signal requirements.

source_rule_text: Optimize dual-moving-average crossover rules by systematically searching parameter space to identify the short-term and long-term lookback period pair that produces the highest historical performance.
